reference: I have been sick on and off for over two years. I keep getting asthmatic bronchitis. I have seen pulmonologists and ear, nose, and throat specialists. I had a sinuplasty last year and had sinus surgery in July. First, my right maxillary sinus was blocked; then this year, all the sinuses were involved. They have discovered Alternaria. First, I was told I have an allergy to it. After skin tests, I am slightly allergic to mold and pollen. Blood tests show it is not an allergy. What does this all mean?
text: I have been sick on and off for over two years. I keep getting agonic bronchitis. I have seen rheumatologists and ear mites and throat specialists. I had a sinus plasty last year and had sinus surgery in July. First, my right maxillary sinus was lost. Then this year, all the sinuses were involved. They have discovered all pneumonia. First, I was told I have an allergy to it. After skin tests, I am slightly allergic to mold and pollen. Blood tests show it is not an allergy. What does this all mean?
